title: astragalus narbonensis subsp. africanus
intro: Astragalus narbonensis subsp. africanus, also known as African milkvetch, is a type of plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus narbonensis subsp. africanus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
